description: Create a 'Head-Up Display' (HUD) overlay for the scene '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz'. Draw a large Red Circle in a new column and configure it to remain fixed to the camera's viewport throughout the animation. Save the modified scene to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/projects/hud_test/hud_test.tnz' and render the resulting animation as a PNG sequence to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/hud_test/'.
